	ProcessSliceDataRepeat 08 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2169: ProcessType[[]bucket<string,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>.array]
	ProcessSliceDataPrep 
	Call 1a 22 00 00 // ProcessType[bucket<string,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	ProcessSliceDataRepeat 08 00 00 00 
	Return

	ProcessSliceDataRepeat 10 00 00 00
